Important Links Approvals Accreditation Status Mandatory Declaration/ NIRF/ NBA/ NAAC Downloads NBA-DCS Important Phone Numbers Designation: Professor & Head Employee ID: 1400618 Qualification: Ph.D. (Engg. Appl. Physics), CMI (L5) :0731-2582 431 : jtandrews[at]gmail.com, jtandrews[at]sgsits.ac.in : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Before joining SGSITS, Indore, Dr J T Andrews held faculty positions at Birla Institute of Technology, - BITS, Mesra, Ranchi. He is presently Professor and Head of Department of Applied Physics and Optoelectronics, SGSITS, Indore. He worked at the Biomedical Application Division of Raja Ramanna Center for Advanced Technology (RRCAT, Indore), Indore as well as at Institut fur Physik, Humboldt University zu Berlin, Germany. He worked for a short spell at Hokkaido University, Sapporo, Japan, and visited major R&D facilities in Europe. He is a recipient of Dr. K. S. Krishnan Award of Department of Atomic Energy, Mumbai and BOYSCAST Award of Department of Science & Technology, GOI, New Delhi, Young Scientist Award from Department of Biotechnology, GoI, New Delhi and nominated for Dr. N. S. Satyamurthy Award of Indian Physics Association. He has published over 75 peer-reviewed international papers and contributed a chapter each in five books. Eight students have been awarded and four are pursuing for Ph.D. under his Guidance. More than 2.5 crores of rupees have generated through R&D Projects. Dr. Andrews’ research interests center around Optical Tweezers, Manipulation of nanomaterials, Biomedical Imaging, Non-invasive glucose measurements with Optical coherence tomography, Optical properties of Quantum dots, Quantum Optical Computer, and NDT&E using real-time holography, etc. Education and Qualification: S.No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1. CMI Level-5 Leadership & Management 2019-20 Dudley College of Engineering, Dudley, UK 2. Ph.D. Quantum Dot, Nonlinear Laser spectroscopy 1994-98 SGSITS, Devi Ahilya University, Indore 3. M.Sc. Engg. Sc. Applied Physics 1992-94 SGSITS, Devi Ahilya University, Indore 4. B.Sc. (Phys-Hons) Physics 1989-92 Madurai Kamaraj Univ., Madurai Work Experience: S.No. Employer Designation Department Duration of Employment-In Months Date of Joining Mode of Employment 1. SGSITS, Indore Professor Appl. Physics & Opto Apr. 09 – cont. 01/04/2009 Regular 2. SGSITS, Indore Asso. Professor Appl. Physics & Opto Dec. 07 – Apr. 09 13/12/2007 Regular 3. BIT, Mesra, Ranchi Asso. Professor Appl. Physics Feb. 07 – Dec. 07 01/02/2007 Regular 4. Humboldt Univ. zu Berlin BOYSCAST Fellow Inst. fur Phyzik Feb. 03 – Feb. 05 01/02/2003 Deputation 5. BIT, Mesra, Ranchi Reader Appl. Physics Nov. 02 – Feb. 07 01/11/2002 Regular 6. RRCAT, Indore KSK RA Biomedical Appl. Section June. 00 – Feb. 02 01/06/2000 Regular 7. BIT, Mesra, Ranchi Sr. Lecturer Appl. Physics Feb. 02 – Nov. 02 01/02/2002 Regular 8. BIT, Mesra, Ranchi Asst. Professor Appl. Physics Jun 99 – Feb.02 13/06/1999 Regular Research Details: 1998 – June 1999 :Post-doctoral Research Fellow at SGSITS, under National Laser Program of Department of Atomic Energy (Applied Research on Lasers & Mat Processing) 2000 – Feb. 2002, Dr. K. S. Krishnan Fellow of Department of Atomic Energy and worked at Raja Ramanna Centre for Advanced technology, Indore (Development of First Optical Coherence Tomography of the country at Biomedical Applications Division of CAT, Indore) 2003 – Feb. 2005, BOYSCAST Fellow of Department of Science & Technology, New Delhi and worked at Humboldt University, Berlin, Germany (Coherent control using CdS/CdSe Quantum dots for optical computers) June 2009 – till date as a coordinator of National MEMS Design Center , carrying out various design characterization of MEMS based devices using COMSOL, Intellisuite, Coventor and BeamPro. June 2009 – till date ; executed 12 R&D projects (national and international) with financial support from agencies like DST, AICTE, DRDO, ICMR etc. The total value of R&D financial support generated is more than Rs. 3.00 crores. PhD Supervision: Awarded Ongoing Ph.D. Awarded Dr. K. Bose (Applied Physics): Testing and Measurement of Physical Parameters using holographic interferometry (2007), BIT, Mesra, Ranchi, JH. Dr. R. Poddar (Biotechnology) : Non-invasive pathological measurements using Optical Coherence Tomography (2008), BIT, Mesra, Ranchi, JH. Dr. (Mrs) S. R. Sharma (Electronics & Instrumentation): Imaging of biological samples using Optical Coherence Tomography (2009), BIT, Mesra, Ranchi, JH. Dr. S. Chattopathyay (Physics): Studies of Optical and Electronic Properties of Core/Shell Quantum Dots , Submitted (2012), SoP, DAVV, Indore, MP. Dr. J. Solanki (Physics/Medical Instrumentation) : Non-invasive, Non-contact Monitoring of Blood Glucose using Optical Coherence Tomography , (2013), SoP, DAVV/SGSITS, Indore, MP. Dr. Om Prakash Choudhary, Design, Fabrication and Characteriation of Optical Coherence Tomography on a Chip , (Applied Physics) (2019), SGSITS/DAVV, Indore MP. Mr Dheeraj Dhoolani: A Study of Non-linear Optical Properties of Metamataerials , (Physics) (2021), SoP, DAVV/SGSITS, Indore, MP Shri Manish Mehta (2022), Quantum Computing with Semiconductor Quantum Dots , (Physics) (2024) SoP, DAVV/SGSITS, Indore, MP Current Ph.D. Students Shri Lokendra Chouhan (2024), Study, Design, Optimization and Fabrication of Integrated Optical Low Coherence Reflectometer , SoP, DAVV/SGSITS, Indore, MP Ashish Singh Bais (2024), Design optimization and fabrication of integrated optical coherence tomography on a single chip, SoP, DAVV/SGSITS, Indore, MP Surendra Rawat (2026), Study of co-eventum Mechanics to Quantum Logic Operations , SoP, DAVV/SGSITS, Indore, MP Publications: in Peer Reviewed Journals 49All Optical Integrated MOEMS Optical Coherence Tomography SystemAshish Singh Bais, Lokendra Singh Chouhan, Joseph Thomas Andrews, J. SHRI GOVINDRAM SEKSARIA INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY & SCIENCE, INDORE 'NAAC A GRADE' , An Autonomous Institute, established in 1952, run by Govt. of Madhya Pradesh Affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal & Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Indore
Prof. Neetesh Purohit Joined as Director SGSITS on 30 th October 2024
